form.formComment: Effortless winner to score by 7 lengths in a Free For All last start at Q Parklands, recording a convincing 29.40 over the 520m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Effortless winner to score by 7 lengths in a Free For All last start at Q Parklands, recording a convincing 29.40 over the 520m journey. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Latest effort finished last over 510m at this track beaten 14 lengths (31.08) behind Quest For Pace in a OPEN on April 1. Has run blistering time here with a 29.61 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished last over 510m at this track beaten 14 lengths (31.08) behind Quest For Pace in a OPEN on April 1. Has run blistering time here with a 29.61 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Talented type with an excellent strike rate at this journey. Has been prominent in the run and duly saluted at her last couple, most recently over 510m at this track in a handy 29.52 beating Drink Tins. On a hot winning streak and likely to score again.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (30.19) in a Grade 3/4, finishing a 2.5 lengths second. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and two places from six starts. Can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: At approximately the 50 metres faulted in action, losing ground as a result.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 510m in 30.06. Followed that up with a minor placing over 510m at this track at Grade 4/5 three days ago. Going better than form suggests. Don't underestimate.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (30.03) at this track, making it two placings on end. Will need plenty of luck.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 498m at Townsville clocking 28.59. Racing well and can find winning form again.
